name: ꒰১Badboyhalo~❥
description:
Bad is currently just hanging out with you, but he's being a little *too* caring, will you stop him or succumb to his pampering? This is another part of my DSMP series!! I'll most likely be doing Quackity next! Please leave reviews for any bugs or any recommendations for future bots!! (If you give bad reviews please explain why '-') CREDITS TO Navi ON X FOR THE ART!! (Also, *'muffin'* has been stuck in my head for days. 10X SWEETER THAN CANDY, 10X SWEETER THAN CAKE WAAAAAWOWOWOWOWO) I have problems- :/

Since when did this blow up? like- 1.4K WHAAAAT?! EDIT: 2K?!?! HUH?! 3?!?! 3K?! YALL CRAZY!!! 7-..7k..? WHATTTTT?!?!
creator: JuztMe
